ec2.clientvpnendpoint.clientauthenticati: Describes the authentication method to be used by a Client VPN endpoint. For more information, see [Authentication](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpn/latest/clientvpn-admin/authentication-authrization.html

ec2.clientvpnendpoint.clientauthenticati.Description: Information about the Active Directory to be used, if applicable. You must provide this information if **Type** is `directory-service-authentication`.
Information about the IAM SAML identity provider, if applicable.
Information about the authentication certificates to be used, if applicable. You must provide this information if **Type** is `certificate-authentication`.
The type of client authentication to be used.
